uid.description: The unique identifier for the user

email.description: The email address of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

photoURL.description: The profile photo URL of the user

progress.description: A map of course IDs to progress percentage

createdAt.description: When the user account was created

WorkspaceSnippet.title: WorkspaceSnippet
WorkspaceSnippet.description: A saved code snippet from the workspace

uid.description: The user ID who owns this snippet

courseId.description: The course ID this snippet belongs to

updatedAt.description: When the snippet was last updated

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A message in the chat history

uid.description: The user ID who owns this chat

/users/{userId}/workspace/{courseId}.description: User's saved code snippets for specific courses

/users/{userId}/chat_history/{messageId}.description: User's chat history with the Scholar Assistant
